data.title: Fitts's Law Application
data.description: UI elements are designed with size and distance considerations for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements are adequately sized and positioned.

data.title: Hick’s Law for Simplification
data.description: Reduces cognitive load by minimizing decision points per interface.
data.technical_spec: Operates with clear pathways and streamlined user choices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Combines an attractive design with user-friendly functionality to increase usability perception.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates visual hierarchy and color psychology.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Maintains uniform design language across different sections of the app.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to visual and interaction standards for a coherent experience.

data.title: Feedback Mechanisms
data.description: Provides users immediate response or guidance after actions.
data.technical_spec: Responsive animations and message prompts post-interaction.
